basic_details.job_title: FACT Resident Construction Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Fertilisers and Chemicals Travancore (FACT) Resident Construction Manager Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://fact.co.in/ under Advt. No. 04/2026. Eligible candidates are invited to apply for the Resident Construction Manager (RCM) post through the FACT Resident Construction Manager Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 45 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST up to 5 years and for OBC (NCL) up to 3 years. Age relaxation for Ex-Service personnel as per GOI guidelines.

qualification.details: Resident Construction Manager (RCM): Degree in Civil Engineering with a minimum of 10 years of post-qualification experience at site in construction projects.

salary_details.details: Rs.49,860/- per month for 10 years' experience. Maximum consolidated pay of Rs.57,830/- per month. An additional increment of 3% for each completed year of additional relevant experience over and above the minimum experience, subject to the maximum consolidated pay.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the FACT Resident Construction Manager Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of FACT to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download FACT Resident Construction Manager Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the FACT Resident Construction Manager recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the FACT Resident Construction Manager recruitment is 30th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Resident Construction Manager post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Degree in Civil Engineering with a minimum of 10 years of post-qualification experience at site in construction projects to be eligible for the Resident Construction Manager position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the FACT Resident Construction Manager role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Resident Construction Manager post is 45 years. Age relaxations are applicable for SC/ST and OBC (NCL) categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Resident Construction Manager position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Resident Construction Manager post ranges from Rs.49,860/- to Rs.57,830/- per month, with provisions for increments based on additional experience.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Resident Construction Manager role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Resident Construction Manager position involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q6. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: The recruitment for the Resident Construction Manager post is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the Walk-in Interview be held?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be held at the HR Department, FEDO Buildings, Eloor.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring their ORIGINAL CERTIFICATES and self-attested copies of certificates to the Walk-in Interview on 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates apply offline?
faq.answer: No, candidates must register themselves by filling and submitting details in the Online Form via the official website. The application form itself needs to be filled manually, signed, photo affixed, and uploaded in PDF format within the online form.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website for FACT recruitment?
faq.answer: The official website for FACT recruitment is www.fact.co.in. All application and recruitment-related information can be found here.
